title: QuantiNova Probe qPCR
description: QIAGEN probe-based fast 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C activation, ultrafast 2-step cycling, no melt curve.

ingredients.name: QN ROX Dye Solution (Applied Biosystems cyclers only)
Primer-probe mix (8 uM each primer + 4 uM probe)

payload.notes: Probe-based (hydrolysis probe) chemistry, so there is no melt curve. Fast 2-step protocol. Primers and probe are supplied as a single 20X primer-probe mix (8 uM each primer plus 4 uM probe), giving 0.4 uM each primer and 0.2 uM probe final. Singleplex combined annealing/extension is 5 sec; use 30 sec for duplex assays (or the shortest time your cycler accepts for data acquisition). 40 cycles (depends on template amount). QN ROX Dye Solution is added only on Applied Biosystems cyclers (1 uL of a 1:20 dilution for high-ROX, or 0.1 uL of a 1:200 dilution for low-ROX); no ROX on Rotor-Gene, Bio-Rad CFX, or Roche LightCycler. For 384-well plates use a 10 uL reaction. Source: QIAGEN QuantiNova Probe PCR Kit Quick-Start Protocol (HB-1581), https://www.qiagen.com/us/resources/download/Protocols/quantinova-probe-pcr-quick-start-protocol
